section_name: Extended Registration of Certain Rental Vehicles
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 502. Registration of Vehicles
##### § 502.0026 — Extended Registration of Certain Rental Vehicles

(a) Notwithstanding Section 502.044 (Registration Period) , the initial registration period is three years for a passenger car or light truck:

    (1) that is sold in this state or purchased by a commercial fleet buyer described by Section 501.0234 (Duty of Vehicle Dealer on Sale of Certain Vehicles) (b)(4) for use in this state;

    (2) that has not been previously registered in this or another state;

    (3) that on the date of sale is of the current or preceding model year; and

    (4) for which a rental certificate has been furnished as described by Section 152.061 (Registration of Motor Vehicle Purchased for Rental) (b), Tax Code.

(b) Payment for all applicable fees, including any optional fee imposed under Subchapter H and other registration fees and the fee required by Section 548.5035 (Initial Three-year Inspection of Certain Rental Vehicles) , for the entire registration period is due at the time of registration.

*Added by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 362 (S.B.2102), Sec. 3, eff. September 1, 2023.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Notwithstanding Section 502.044 (Registration Period) , the initial registration period is three years for a passenger car or light truck:
that is sold in this state or purchased by a commercial fleet buyer described by Section 501.0234 (Duty of Vehicle Dealer on Sale of Certain Vehicles) (b)(4) for use in this state;
that has not been previously registered in this or another state;
that on the date of sale is of the current or preceding model year; and
for which a rental certificate has been furnished as described by Section 152.061 (Registration of Motor Vehicle Purchased for Rental) (b), Tax Code.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Payment for all applicable fees, including any optional fee imposed under Subchapter H and other registration fees and the fee required by Section 548.5035 (Initial Three-year Inspection of Certain Rental Vehicles) , for the entire registration period is due at the time of registration.
